# tplinkeasysmart_lag (Resource)

Manage one static LAG group and its member ports.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "tplinkeasysmart_lag" "lag1" {
  group_id = 1
  ports    = [1, 2]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (Number) Static LAG group number.
- `ports` (Set of Number) Ports assigned to the LAG group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier derived from group_id.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = tplinkeasysmart_lag.lag1
  id = "1"
}

resource "tplinkeasysmart_lag" "lag1" {
  group_id = 1
  ports    = [1, 2]
}
```
